slots.html:
Swift Appraisal

Ready to make a change? Drop by for a quick and complimentary appraisal. No appointment necessary; we’re prepared to assess your vehicle today.

Secure & Professional

Our appraisers will handle your evaluation with the utmost professionalism and respect – expect only fair and competitive offers, no lowballing.

On-The-Spot Payment

Once we assess your vehicle, our goal is to finalize the deal quickly. You could possibly leave our dealership with a check that very same day.

buttons.text: Get Your Easy key Exchange Offer!

slots.html:
Get a No-Obligation Trade Appraisal Today!

Thinking it might be time for a new ride? Whether your current vehicle is costing you too much in repairs, its warranty has expired, or you’re simply looking to move on from an upside-down loan, Tomes Auto Group is here to help with our hassle-free “Sell Us Your Car” program. This program is designed to ease you into a brand-new Ford, Volkswagen, or Subaru with minimal fuss. Often, you can transition with little to no money down while potentially lowering your monthly payments!

Ready to see how much you could switch up your drive? Speak with one of our dedicated Trade-In Specialists today to arrange a no-obligation trade appraisal. At Tomes Auto Group, we’re committed to maximizing your satisfaction with both your trade-in and your overall car buying experience. Let us assist you in getting the best value for your trade and in selecting the new Volkswagen, Subaru, or Ford that perfectly suits your family’s needs.

Benefits of Trading In at Tomes Auto Group

  • Above Market Value Offers: At Tomes Auto Group, we evaluate every trade with precision and integrity, ensuring you receive the best possible offer that often surpasses market value.
  • Advantageous Financing Terms: Transition smoothly with financing options that work for you. Our relationships with top lenders allow us to secure favorable terms, making your next purchase more affordable.
  • Enhanced Efficiency: Upgrade to a newer model that runs cleaner and goes further, reducing your environmental impact and saving you money at the pump.
  • Reduced Maintenance Costs: Say goodbye to frequent repairs. Our newer models come with fewer maintenance needs, giving you peace of mind and saving on upkeep.
  • Latest Features: Experience cutting-edge technology with the latest in-car entertainment and convenience features designed to enhance your driving experience.
  • Lower Monthly Payments: We work hard to make your new car as affordable as possible. With our tailored financing solutions, you can enjoy lower monthly payments on your next vehicle.
  • Extended Warranty Coverage: Drive with confidence knowing your new vehicle is covered. Our newer models come with comprehensive warranty plans that protect your investment.
  • Advanced Safety Technologies: Benefit from the latest safety innovations. Our modern vehicles are equipped with state-of-the-art safety features that protect you and your loved ones on the road.

Experience all these benefits and more when you choose to trade in your current vehicle for a new or newer model at Tomes Auto Group. Let us help you make a smooth transition to a car that fits your lifestyle and budget.

Why Sell To Us?

  • In-Person Scheduling: Visit us at your convenience, or we can schedule a specific time for your appraisal.
  • Transparent Appraisals: We pride ourselves on providing clear, straightforward appraisals. You’ll understand every part of the process and how we arrive at our offer.
  • Efficient Appraisal Process: Receive an offer in 20 minutes or less. We value your time as much as we value your car.
  • Streamlined Paperwork: Our paperwork process is quick and efficient, ensuring you can sell your car and move on without hassle.

What to Bring When Selling Your Car

To ensure a smooth and efficient transaction, please bring the following items:

  • Car Title: Bring your car’s title or payoff information. It’s important that all titleholders are present during the transaction.
  • Registration: Ensure you have a valid and current vehicle registration to verify ownership.
  • Valid State-Issued Photo ID: Required for all title holders to verify ownership and identity.
  • Keys, Remotes, and Owner’s Manuals: Bringing all original keys, remotes, and manuals is crucial. Missing items may adjust the offer.
  • Title or Payoff Information: All title holders should be present during the sale. If your title shows a lien that has been paid off, please bring the lien release from the lien holder.

Bringing these items will help expedite the process and ensure that you receive the best possible offer for your vehicle.

How It Works

  • Get an Instant Estimate: Find out what your car is worth with our instant online valuation tool.
  • No-Appointment Final Offer: Come to our dealership whenever you’re ready. No appointment needed—we’re here to finalize your offer quickly.
  • Quick, No-Obligation Offer: Our experts will inspect your car and provide a no-obligation offer within 30 minutes.
  • Flexible Options: Use the value of your trade to step into a new car, or simply sell it to us for cash. The choice is yours!
slots.preview: Get a No-Obligation Trade Appraisal Today!

slots.html:
Frequently Asked Questions on Selling Your Car

Can I sell my car without buying another one from you?

Absolutely! You can sell your car to us whether you choose to buy from us or not, and our offer will remain consistent.

Can I receive an offer for my car online?

Yes, you can get a preliminary trade-in offer online. Simply click on our “Get Your KBB Cash Offer” button to start the process!

How do you determine the offer for my car?

We assess your car based on current market trends and specific details such as the year, make, model, mileage, and vehicle history. We conduct a thorough inspection for any major issues like frame or flood damage and perform a test drive to check mechanical functions like brakes and turn signals. Our offer may be adjusted based on the necessary repairs. However, the overall maintenance and care your car has received play a crucial role in our final appraisal.

How will I get paid for my car?

You will receive a check on the same day you sell us your car—no delays, just quick and easy payment.

Do I need an appointment to get an offer on my car?

No appointment is necessary to receive an offer. However, scheduling one can save you time at the dealership, allowing us to expedite the process and get you paid faster.

Do you purchase leased cars?

Yes, you can sell your leased car to us much like any other financed vehicle in most cases.

What if I owe more on my car than your offer?

If the payoff amount is greater than our offer, this difference is referred to as “negative equity.” In some situations, this negative equity can be rolled into the financing of your next vehicle purchase from us.

Can I sell a car on behalf of a company?

Yes, if you are selling a vehicle on behalf of a company, please consult with a Business Office associate to understand the specific documentation and requirements needed.
